perturbed_task_language: Put the wine bottle on the rack
perturbation_semantics: fixture swap: wine rack relocated; wine bottle and other tabletop objects may also be at non-base positions. Localized everything visually from depth + back-projection.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot likely fails (does not reliably grasp the slim wine bottle or places at the base-scene rack location)
strategy_notes: Perception-only localization. (1) Wine bottle coarse-localized in image_cam_00 by finding the dark vertical column at pixels rows~120-160 cols~120-128 -> world (-0.058, -0.005, base z=0.902, top z=1.05). (2) Wine rack top center sampled from agentview image_cam_00 wooden rack region rows 80-115 cols 25-65 -> median world (-0.019, -0.226, z=1.175). (3) Approached over bottle and used wrist cam world_wrist to refine bottle xy to (-0.068, -0.005). (4) Pi0_pick failed 3x to close gripper on the bottle (descended OK but never committed to grasping); fell back to scripted grasp. (5) Discovered the bottle slips through the gripper when grasped at the wide body z=0.96 (qpos~0.011); grasping slightly lower (z=0.96 at refined xy -0.068) actually pinched the neck/shoulder region giving qpos=0.006 (tighter). (6) Fast lift (step_clip=0.030) keeps the bottle from slipping; slow lift causes the bottle to slip out as the gripper closes further during OSC oscillation. (7) Carried in two segments at z=1.30 with a set_gripper +1 re-firm between segments; the libero_terminated predicate fired during the second carry segment as the bottle crossed over the wine rack region.
